summary: Host tiling for custom reduce ops should read input shape from gert::StorageShape/GetStorageShape instead of treating TilingContext::GetInputShape as gert::Shape with GetOriginShape. When host-side ReduceMin tmp-size APIs are unavailable in the current compile unit, remove the explicit tmp-buffer plumbing and switch the kernel to the built-in ReduceMin<..., true>(dst, src, shape, srcInnerPad) form after padding each UB tile.
